title: AIND Ephys Pipeline Parameters
description: Configuration schema for the AIND electrophysiology analysis pipeline. See https://aind-ephys-pipeline.readthedocs.io/en/latest/parameters.html for documentation.

job_dispatch.description: Parameters for the job dispatch step, which generates JSON job files for parallel processing.

split_segments.description: Whether to split recording segments for parallel processing.

split_groups.description: Whether to process different channel groups separately.

debug.description: Whether to run in DEBUG mode (clips recording to a short duration).

debug_duration.description: Duration in seconds of clipped recording in debug mode. Only used if debug is enabled.

skip_timestamps_check.description: Whether to skip the timestamps check.

input.description: Which loader to use for data ingestion.

spikeinterface_info.description: Configuration for the spikeinterface loader. Only used when input is 'spikeinterface'.

reader_kwargs.description: Keyword arguments passed to the reader (e.g., {'folder': '/path/to/folder'}).

keep_stream_substrings.description: Stream name substrings to keep (e.g., 'AP' or ['AP', 'LFP']).

skip_stream_substrings.description: Stream name substrings to skip (e.g., 'NIDQ' or ['USB', 'EVENTS']).

probe_paths.description: Path(s) to ProbeInterface JSON file(s). If a dict, keys are stream names and values are probe paths.

preprocessing.description: Parameters for the preprocessing step (filtering, denoising, motion correction).

denoising_strategy.description: Denoising strategy: common median reference (cmr) or highpass spatial filter (destripe).

min_preprocessing_duration.description: Minimum recording duration in seconds required to run preprocessing.

filter_type.description: Type of frequency filter to apply.

remove_bad_channels.description: Whether to remove detected bad channels.

max_bad_channel_fraction.description: Maximum fraction of bad channels allowed. If exceeded, the recording is skipped.

margin_ms.description: Margin in milliseconds for edge effects.
Margin in milliseconds for edge effects.

phase_shift.description: Parameters for inter-sample phase shift correction.

margin_ms.description: Margin in milliseconds for edge effects.

method.description: Method used for bad channel detection.

outside_channels_location.description: Expected location of outside-brain channels on the probe.

n_neighbors.description: Number of neighbor channels to use for detection.

common_reference.description: Parameters for common reference removal (used when denoising_strategy is 'cmr').

reference.description: Type of reference: global or local.

operator.description: Operator used for computing the reference.

highpass_spatial_filter.description: Parameters for highpass spatial filter (used when denoising_strategy is 'destripe').

n_channel_taper.description: Number of channels for tapering. If null, defaults to n_channel_pad.

apply_agc.description: Whether to apply automatic gain control.

agc_window_length_s.description: Window length in seconds for AGC.

highpass_butter_order.description: Order of the Butterworth highpass filter.

highpass_butter_wn.description: Normalized cutoff frequency for the Butterworth filter.

motion_correction.description: Parameters for motion estimation and correction.

apply.description: Whether to apply motion correction to the recording.

detect_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments for peak detection.

select_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments for peak selection.

localize_peaks_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments for peak localization.

estimate_motion_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments for motion estimation.

interpolate_motion_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments for motion interpolation.

postprocessing.description: Parameters for postprocessing (computing spike/unit metrics and extensions).

use_motion_corrected.description: Whether to use the motion-corrected recording for postprocessing.

method.description: Method used to compute channel sparsity.

radius_um.description: Radius in micrometers for sparsity computation (used when method is 'radius').

duplicate_threshold.description: Agreement threshold for removing duplicate units.

return_scaled.description: Whether to return scaled (in microvolts) or raw traces.

random_spikes.description: Parameters for random spike selection used in extensions.

max_spikes_per_unit.description: Maximum number of spikes per unit to use.

margin_size.description: Margin size for spike selection. If null, no margin is applied.

seed.description: Random seed for reproducibility. If null, no seed is set.

num_chunks_per_segment.description: Number of chunks per segment to use for noise estimation.

chunk_size.description: Size of each chunk in samples.

ms_before.description: Time in milliseconds to extract before spike peak.

ms_after.description: Time in milliseconds to extract after spike peak.

dtype.description: Data type for waveforms. If null, uses the recording's dtype.

method.description: Method used to compute template similarity.

isi_histograms.description: Parameters for inter-spike interval histogram computation.

spike_locations.description: Parameters for individual spike location estimation.

upsampling_factor.description: Factor for upsampling templates before computing metrics.

sparsity.description: Sparsity parameters for template metrics. If null, uses the global sparsity.

include_multi_channel_metrics.description: Whether to include multi-channel template metrics.

principal_components.description: Parameters for PCA computation on waveforms.

n_components.description: Number of principal components to compute.

whiten.description: Whether to whiten the principal components.

quality_metrics_names.description: List of quality metric names to compute.

quality_metrics.description: Detailed configuration for each quality metric.

bin_duration_s.description: Bin duration in seconds for presence ratio computation.

peak_mode.description: Mode for peak detection in SNR computation.

isi_threshold_ms.description: ISI threshold in milliseconds for violation detection.

exclude_ref_period_below_ms.description: Exclude refractory periods below this value in milliseconds.

contamination_values.description: Contamination values to test. If null, uses defaults.

num_histogram_bins.description: Number of bins for the amplitude histogram.

histogram_smoothing_value.description: Smoothing value for the amplitude histogram.

amplitudes_bins_min_ratio.description: Minimum ratio of amplitudes to bins.

average_num_spikes_per_bin.description: Average number of spikes per bin.

amplitude_extension.description: Name of the amplitude extension to use.

bin_size_s.description: Bin size in seconds for firing range computation.

synchrony_sizes.description: Sizes of synchrony groups to compute.

max_spikes.description: Maximum number of spikes to use.
Maximum number of spikes to use.
Maximum number of spikes to use.

curation.description: Parameters for quality control curation of sorted units.

query.description: Pandas query string for threshold-based unit filtering using quality metrics.

noise_neural_classifier.description: Hugging Face model path for classifying units as noise vs neural.

sua_mua_classifier.description: Hugging Face model path for classifying neural units as single-unit (SUA) vs multi-unit (MUA).

visualization.description: Parameters for generating plots and interactive visualizations.

n_snippets_per_segment.description: Number of timeseries snippets per segment.

snippet_duration_s.description: Duration of each snippet in seconds.

detection.description: Peak detection parameters for drift visualization.

localization.description: Peak localization parameters for drift visualization.

n_skip.description: Number of spikes to skip for plotting (subsampling factor).

nwb.description: Parameters for NWB (Neurodata Without Borders) export.

backend.description: Backend to use for NWB file writing.

stub.description: Whether to create a stub NWB file (truncated, for testing).

stub_seconds.description: Duration in seconds for the stub NWB file.

write_lfp.description: Whether to write LFP electrical series.

write_raw.description: Whether to write RAW electrical series.

lfp_highpass_freq_min.description: LFP highpass filter minimum frequency in Hz.

surface_channel_agar_probes_indices.description: Comma-separated indices of probes with surface channel in agar.

freq_min.description: Minimum frequency for LFP bandpass filter in Hz.

freq_max.description: Maximum frequency for LFP bandpass filter in Hz.

sampling_rate.description: Target sampling rate for LFP in Hz.

spikesorting.description: Parameters for the spike sorting step.

sorter.description: Spike sorter to use. If null, uses the --sorter command-line parameter.

job_kwargs.description: SpikeInterface job keyword arguments for parallel processing.

progress_bar.description: Whether to display a progress bar.

peak_sign.description: Sign of the peak to detect.

figsize.description: Figure size as [width, height] in inches.

skip_motion_correction.description: Whether to skip the sorter's internal motion correction.

min_drift_channels.description: Minimum number of channels required to enable drift correction.

raise_if_fails.description: Whether to raise an error if spike sorting fails.

clear_cache.description: Whether to force PyTorch memory cleanup between runs.

nblocks.description: Number of non-rigid blocks for drift correction. 0 disables drift correction.

do_CAR.description: Whether to apply common average reference.

invert_sign.description: Whether to invert the sign of the data.

nt.description: Number of temporal samples per waveform.

shift.description: Scalar shift to apply to data. If null, computed automatically.

scale.description: Scalar scale to apply to data. If null, computed automatically.

artifact_threshold.description: Threshold for artifact removal. If null, no artifact removal.

nskip.description: Number of batches to skip for drift estimation.

highpass_cutoff.description: Highpass filter cutoff frequency in Hz.

binning_depth.description: Bin size in micrometers for drift estimation.

nt0min.description: Minimum time index for template. If null, computed automatically.

dmin.description: Minimum vertical spacing between channels. If null, computed automatically.

dminx.description: Minimum horizontal spacing between channels in micrometers.

nearest_chans.description: Number of nearest channels for template matching.

nearest_templates.description: Number of nearest templates to consider.

max_channel_distance.description: Maximum channel distance. If null, no limit.

templates_from_data.description: Whether to derive templates from data.

n_pcs.description: Number of principal components for template features.

x_centers.description: X-centers for non-rigid drift correction. If null, computed automatically.

duplicate_spike_ms.description: Time window in milliseconds for duplicate spike removal.

save_preprocessed_copy.description: Whether to save a copy of the preprocessed data.

bad_channels.description: List of bad channel indices. If null, auto-detected.

save_extra_vars.description: Whether to save extra variables for debugging.

keep_good_only.description: Whether to keep only 'good' labeled units.

skip_kilosort_preprocessing.description: Whether to skip Kilosort's internal preprocessing.

use_binary_file.description: Whether to use a binary file. If null, auto-determined.

delete_recording_dat.description: Whether to delete the recording .dat file after sorting.

skip_motion_correction.description: Whether to skip the sorter's internal motion correction.

min_drift_channels.description: Minimum number of channels required to enable drift correction.

raise_if_fails.description: Whether to raise an error if spike sorting fails.

car.description: Whether to apply common average reference.

minFR.description: Minimum firing rate for a unit.

minfr_goodchannels.description: Minimum firing rate for good channels.

nblocks.description: Number of non-rigid blocks for drift correction.

nPCs.description: Number of principal components for features.

nfilt_factor.description: Factor for number of filters (nfilt = nchannels * nfilt_factor).

NT.description: Batch size in samples. If null, auto-determined.

keep_good_only.description: Whether to keep only 'good' labeled units.

skip_kilosort_preprocessing.description: Whether to skip Kilosort's internal preprocessing.

scaleproc.description: Scaling factor for whitened data. If null, auto-determined.

save_rez_to_mat.description: Whether to save rez structure to .mat file.

delete_tmp_files.description: List of temporary file types to delete after sorting.

delete_recording_dat.description: Whether to delete the recording .dat file after sorting.

ms_before.description: Time in ms before spike peak.

ms_after.description: Time in ms after spike peak.

regularize.description: Whether to regularize the whitening matrix.

method_kwargs.description: Keyword arguments for the detection method.
Keyword arguments for the selection method.

apply_motion_correction.description: Whether to apply internal motion correction.

max_distance_um.description: Maximum distance in micrometers for merging.

method_kwargs.description: Keyword arguments for the clustering method.

sparsify_threshold.description: Threshold for sparsification. If null, no sparsification.

method_kwargs.description: Keyword arguments for the matching method.

memory_limit.description: Memory limit as a fraction of available RAM.

delete_cache.description: Whether to delete cache after sorting.

multi_units_only.description: Whether to only detect multi-unit activity.

job_kwargs.description: Additional job keyword arguments for SpykingCircus2.

deterministic_peaks_detection.description: Whether to use deterministic peak detection.
